fase01-o-caos-das-strings/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the JDK migration.
fase01-o-caos-das-strings/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 language features and bytecode, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 compatibility required by the migration.
